$metadata.title: Stencil + Frame design tokens
$metadata.note: Source of truth for the S+F visual system. CSS custom properties in index.html and any compiled CSS are derived from this file — edit here, not there. Stack: Fraunces (display, opsz/wght/SOFT/WONK) + Mona Sans Variable (body/UI, replaces DM Sans) + DM Mono (code, unchanged). See DESIGN.md §4 for the canonical role table. Note: a Mona Sans-unified pass on 2026-07-06 was reverted same day — Fraunces remains the display face.

display.$description: Display and headline role. Fraunces variable (opsz 9–144, wght 100–900, SOFT 0–100, WONK 0–1, italic). SOFT/WONK are display-only — never apply at body sizes. Big Shoulders Display retired; Fraunces covers all display duty. See DESIGN.md §4.

sans.$description: Body copy and UI text role. Same family as display; differentiated by wght/wdth axis preset only. Previously: DM Sans.

mono.$description: Code, technical accents, brand.md editor UI, margin annotations (P2 surface). Unchanged in this migration.

display.$description: Display / headline. Fraunces at maximum optical size (opsz 144) and high weight. SOFT and WONK axes available per treatment — not set as defaults here; apply at treatment level. Human-voice copy is lowercase; uppercase reserved for UI chrome (subhead token).

subhead.$description: Subhead / eyebrow. Normal width, semibold. Uppercase with wide tracking — UI chrome register (labels, nav, badges). Contrast against display token makes hierarchy readable without additional typefaces.

body.$description: Body copy. Normal width and weight. Apply opacity: 0.7 on --warm-white (#f0ede6) for secondary reads — do not use a different color, use opacity.

cta.$description: CTA / link. Medium weight, normal width. Lowercase — voice register, not chrome. Distinction from subhead (uppercase/chrome) encodes the brand's caps rule in the token itself.

session-hero.$description: Stencil session vertical hero (full session name). Fraunces at large (not max) optical size — authority restrained relative to landing page display (opsz 144, wght 900) to suit the session's introspective register. Uppercase + scale carries the session's opening beat.

session-question.$description: Stencil session questions and masked slide-up reveals. Lighter than body (400/100) — reads as genuinely questioning rather than declarative. Italic available for invitation lines; apply per-instance, not in this token.

reveal.$description: Per-character stagger for kinetic reveals (The Correction on the landing page; any character-by-character reveal). Line 2 starts when line 1 is 40% through. Design-specific — not a general character-stagger value.

gold.$description: Primary accent — labels, CTAs, hairlines, interactive affordance only.

coral.$description: Vesica Piscis mark only — never used elsewhere in the system.
